script_templates: {hook} {character} had always {action}. But one day, everything changed. {conflict}. In that moment, {character} realized the truth: {moral_lesson}. Remember: {cta}.
{hook} For years, {character} believed that {action} was the only way. Then {conflict}. That single moment changed everything. {moral_lesson}. {cta}.
conflicts: A child stopped him on the road with tears in their eyes.
A letter arrived that changed everything.
The very person they hurt appeared to save them.
A sudden illness forced them to face their choices.
lessons: The truth always finds its way out.
What you give always comes back.
Real wealth is in relationships, not money.
ctas: Subscribe for more stories that touch the heart.

script_templates: {hook} {character} discovered {clue}. Everyone thought they knew the answer. But {red_herring}. The real truth? {twist}. No one saw it coming. {cta}.
{hook} The case looked simple. {character} found {clue}. But then {red_herring}. The truth was darker than anyone imagined. {twist}. {cta}.
clues: a locked diary under the floorboards.
a photo with a face scratched out.
an address written in invisible ink.
a phone that kept ringing from a dead number.
red_herrings: the evidence pointed the wrong way.
the witness was lying for a reason.
twists: the victim had staged the whole thing.
the answer was in plain sight all along.

script_templates: {hook} {character} was alone in the house. {setup}. Then {escalation}. And when they finally turned on the light... {reveal}. Sleep tight. If you can.
{hook} Nobody warned {character} about the house. {setup}. At first, they ignored it. Then {escalation}. What they found... {reveal}. Follow if you dare.
setups: The power went out at midnight.
They heard footsteps above — but no one else was home.
The camera feed showed a figure in the corner.
The dog refused to enter the room.
escalations: something knocked three times from inside the wall.
a child's laugh echoed from the basement.
a hand appeared under the door.
reveals: the shadow had been there all along.
the door had been locked from the inside.
the face in the mirror wasn't theirs.
the voicemail was recorded after they died.
ctas: Follow for more stories that will keep you up at night.

script_templates: {hook} {character} had lost everything. {low_point}. But instead of giving up, {action}. {result}. Your comeback starts today. {cta}.
{hook} Everyone called {character} a failure. {low_point}. But they made one decision that changed everything. {action}. {result}. {cta}.
low_points: No money. No job. No plan.
They had 30 days before losing their home.
actions: they woke up at 5am every single day.
they wrote one page every morning.
they called 50 people and got one yes.
results: Two years later, they built a million-dollar company.
The same people who doubted them now ask for advice.
ctas: Follow for stories that will change your mindset.

script_templates: {hook} {character} thought they knew {partner}. {setup}. But then {conflict}. And in that moment, {realization}. Love is never what it seems.
{hook} {character} and {partner} seemed perfect together. {setup}. Until {conflict}. That was the day {realization}. {cta}.
setups: Everything seemed perfect from the outside.
They had built a life together.
Friends called them the perfect couple.
conflicts: a photo surfaced from 5 years ago.
a late-night call exposed the truth.
realizations: some people enter your life to teach you, not to stay.
the truth always finds its moment.
ctas: Follow for daily stories about love and life.
